title: WebNN inference service integration (LiteRT-LM backend)
description: Repo-owned lane for WebNN (navigator.ml) integration using LiteRT-LM as the unified C++ inference backend across all platforms.
notes: LiteRT-LM is the single C++ backend for all platforms — no per-platform backend switching.
Keep service/process integration here, not in generic platform build-fix patches.
Use patches/common for cross-platform WebNN WebKit interfaces (spec IDL, graph builder, etc.).
Use patches/<platform> only for platform-specific build hooks or GPU delegate loading.
Acceptance requires MiniBrowser runtime validation where navigator.ml.createContext() succeeds.
